creator: max@wide.ad.jp
text:
>Synopsis:       submission of new port of zlib-1.0.4
     Zlib 1.0.4 is already in FreeBSD-current as /usr/src/lib/libz and
ports-current no longer has this package, though, is this some
modification to the existing stuff? Or is this something totally
different?

Where is your submission anyway?
